[CMP-mission-computer](../README.md) *(system)*

# Mission computer — State Transition View — Mission state machine

Behavior: [BHV-mission-fsm](../../../elements/behaviors/BHV-mission-fsm.md)

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PREFLIGHT
    PREFLIGHT --> TAKEOFF: arm_takeoff
    TAKEOFF --> TRANSIT: altitude_reached
    TRANSIT --> ON_TASK: waypoint_reached
    ON_TASK --> STUCK: no_progress [elapsed > 600 s]
    STUCK --> ON_TASK: waypoint_reached
    ON_TASK --> RETURNING: rtl_command
    ON_TASK --> RETURNING: map_boundary
    RETURNING --> LANDED: mode_changed [mode == LAND]
```
